original_statement: what is the callsign of the only community station?
mutated_statement: what is the identifier of the only community outlet that must be both unique and identical to all others?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + wording synonym + semantic addition (contradiction): "callsign" generalized to "identifier" (specific→general) | "community station" reworded to "community outlet" (station→outlet) | added contradictory constraint "that must be both unique and identical to all others" (introduces impossible/ambiguous requirement) (what is the callsign of the only community station? → what is the identifier of the only community outlet that must be both unique and identical to all others?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中对表格的描述（“表格列出一条purpose为'community'的记录，row 1，callsign 7cae”）可以看出agent仅依据可行子集作答，且judge_thought和chain的thought均未提及或质疑变异问题中加入的互斥约束“既唯一又与所有其他相同”。agent直接执行查询并返回标识符7cae，未指出矛盾、未尝试修正或澄清，也未通过逻辑解释合理化该自相矛盾要求。因此将其归类为“无视所有矛盾指令”，因为代理忽略了不可满足的附加条件，只基于原始可解信息继续执行并产出答案。
